---
title: "Session 3: How Does This Actually Work?"
subtitle: "Business Intelligence & AI"
author: "Kerry Back, Rice University"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, revealjs-style.scss]
    slide-number: c
    transition: fade
    navigation-mode: linear
    width: 1920
    height: 1080
    margin: 0.05
    center: true
    include-after-body:
      - text: |
          <script src="https://hypothes.is/embed.js" async></script>
---

## Placeholder

Content coming soon.
